A plane made an emergency landing in the Hudson River with no fatalities, while NYC faces a Code Blue alert due to plunging temperatures and a missing Jersey City teen has prompted a BOLO. Additionally, a Long Island doctor was sentenced for running an oxycodone pill mill.

### Risks & Alerts

- Plane makes emergency landing in Hudson River; all rescued, no deaths. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- BOLO issued for missing Jersey City teen; police seek public assistance. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMieEFVX3lxTFAwWkZjcG9nT2J3X0xpTnh5SENFLVo4aGJ0d3RuNDhfeGNBczVsWFVUa0IwRE9HTVh2aXBLdUlmaTdULVVwWENDbU8yZ2p6cDVhLTdBWXNUaDgyZTRmLWc5YkhYcHplOWtpVEdJM0VPd3lDVnVaVXk5cQ?oc=5)
- Code Blue returns as temperatures plunge in NYC and Newark; stay warm and safe. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxQWnhLYThqQVEzN1FUTjViSjlrUE1OYmZIbnhaV1FlMjJIMjNNOWtkQ3dxemwxRXhVZHBVQVFMdmg1Z0hLZ2dvV2V4amlFLVRHWHM3U3YtbFNic2ZZRGtGUmFKVmRYYlprVGhQTVZ3R0ZnYlFVb2E5V2xRUXhXY3BrZUY1bG45bnRBbGxMeWtsWVNzckd6TDNqd0NqdU5LZw?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- Democrats propose a 25% surcharge on corporations to increase city revenue. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- NYC Council is pushing to ban stores from collecting biometric data from customers. ### Opportunities & Welfare

- New SNAP work requirements take effect, putting benefits at risk for millions in NYC.
